text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Finally, Mejiro Dober's debut race is here! We're
just about to head out so we can get to Niigata
Racecourse early...
Oh, what perfect timing. Dober!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Bright?! What are you doing here?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
I've come to cheer you on, of course. It would be
unacceptable for me to miss my kindred spirit's
debut!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: You came all this way for me? ...Thank you.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: Hehe. Save your thank-yous until you've seen everyone who's come to support you.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Huh?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Good luck, Dober! Just stay relaxed while you
run, and you won't have a thing to worry about!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Cheering for her is Mejiro Ryan, a forerunner to
Dober who has inherited the Mejiro legacy.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I hear they've known each other since Dober was
very young and are practically like sisters.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Show us what all your training has amounted to
out on the track. We're expecting great things
from you.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
There's the "Empress" Air Groove, known for
being part of the mother-daughter duo that
dominated the Japanese Oaks, and also the
student council vice president.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She's also earned a reputation for her caring
nature and frequently mentored Dober before she
had a trainer.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Ryan! Air Groove!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: You shouldn't have... It's so far, and I'm—

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Stop right there! Look, we're all here 'cause we
want to see you race!

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
You came to my debut, so now it's my turn to
cheer you on.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Thank you, really... I'm going to do my best!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
A spark shines bright in Mejiro Dober's eyes, lit
by the kind support of her friends.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Do you even have to ask? Of course I am.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: ...A little. Look, my hands are shaking.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
But I'm going to do this! I have to, for everyone
who came to support me...
choice_data_list: You'll be fine. I believe in you.
You'll be fine. I believe in you.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
But I'm going to do this! I have to, for everyone
who came to support me...
choice_data_list: You'll be fine. I believe in you.
You'll be fine. I believe in you.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Hmph, you're always saying things like that.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Hehe. You're always so straightforward, Trainer.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
If you mean it, then... just keep your eyes on me,
and watch as I cross the finish line.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
If you mean it, then... just keep your eyes on me,
and watch as I cross the finish line.
